description: Composition Magenta sleeveless top made of 97% polyester and 3% lycra, has a deep round neck which is pleated, raglan armholes gathered together with a small band to create a pleated effect and a sash at the back Fit Blouse fit Wash care Machine wash with like colours using warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron Dry clean Year end is all about vacations and parties. Gear up and slip into the festive mood in style with this pleated top from arrow. The polyester/lycra blend is sure to flatter your silhouette, while you look ravishing in this top paired with jeans, stiletto sandals and long earrings. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'8&rdquo and chest 33"
